lines.raw: What was the polite request? | 有礼貌的请求是什么？

lines.english: If you park your car in the wrong place,
lines.chinese: 如果你把车停错了地方，
lines.raw: If you park your car in the wrong place, | 如果你把车停错了地方，

lines.english: a traffic policeman will soon find it.
lines.chinese: 交通警察很快就会发现它。
lines.raw: a traffic policeman will soon find it. | 交通警察很快就会发现它。

lines.english: You will be very lucky if he lets you go without a ticket.
lines.chinese: 如果他让你走而不开罚单，你将非常幸运。
lines.raw: You will be very lucky if he lets you go without a ticket. | 如果他让你走而不开罚单，你将非常幸运。

lines.english: However, this does not always happen.
lines.raw: However, this does not always happen. | 然而，这并非总是发生。

lines.english: Traffic police are sometimes very polite.
lines.chinese: 交通警察有时非常有礼貌。
lines.raw: Traffic police are sometimes very polite. | 交通警察有时非常有礼貌。
During a holiday in Sweden, | 在瑞典度假期间，

lines.english: I found this note on my car:
lines.chinese: 我在车上发现了这张字条：
lines.raw: I found this note on my car: | 我在车上发现了这张字条：

lines.english: 'sir, we welcome you to our city. This is a No Parking area.
lines.chinese: “先生，我们欢迎您来到我们的城市。这里是禁停区。
lines.raw: 'sir, we welcome you to our city. This is a No Parking area. | “先生，我们欢迎您来到我们的城市。这里是禁停区。

lines.english: You will enjoy your stay here if you pay attention to our street signs. This note is only a reminder.'
lines.chinese: 如果您注意我们的路标，您会在这里度过愉快的时光。这张字条只是一个提醒。”
lines.raw: You will enjoy your stay here if you pay attention to our street signs. This note is only a reminder.' | 如果您注意我们的路标，您会在这里度过愉快的时光。这张字条只是一个提醒。”

lines.english: If you receive a request like this, you cannot fail to obey it!
lines.chinese: 如果你收到这样的请求，你不能不遵守它！
lines.raw: If you receive a request like this, you cannot fail to obey it! | 如果你收到这样的请求，你不能不遵守它！
